bind-pdf-form-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller
bind-pdf-form-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF form file to an AutoFiller instance and save the result.

excel-to-datatable-pdf-form.title: Import Excel Data into PDF Form via DataTable
excel-to-datatable-pdf-form.description: Reads an XLSX worksheet, creates a DataTable using the first row as column headers, and fills a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

import-datatable-with-column-settings.title: Import DataTable with Column Settings into PDF Form
import-datatable-with-column-settings.description: Demonstrates configuring DataColumn properties such as ReadOnly and Unique before importing a DataTable into a PDF form using AutoFiller.

import-datatable-autofiller.title: Import DataTable into PDF Form using AutoFiller
import-datatable-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to populate a DataTable and import it into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

fill-pdf-form-save.title: Fill PDF Form and Save Preserving Layout
fill-pdf-form-save.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF form using a DataTable and saving the result while keeping the original layout.

generate-separate-page-per-row.title: Generate Separate PDF Page per DataTable Row and Verify
generate-separate-page-per-row.description: Creates one PDF per DataTable row using AutoFiller, merges them, and checks that the merged document has a page for each row.

adjust-datatable-columns.title: Adjust DataTable Column Names for PDF Form Filling
adjust-datatable-columns.description: Demonstrates renaming DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers before using AutoFiller to populate the form.

fill-pdf-form-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller with Custom DataTable Columns
fill-pdf-form-autofiller.description: Demonstrates adding custom columns to a DataTable and importing it into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

fill-pdf-from-multiple-excel-worksheets.title: Fill PDF Template from Multiple Excel Worksheets using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-from-multiple-excel-worksheets.description: Reads each worksheet of an Excel file into a DataTable and uses Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller to generate a separate filled PDF for each sheet.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller and Handle Missing Fields
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.description: Demonstrates using AutoFiller to populate PDF form fields and handling errors when the input file is missing or a field cannot be found.

fill-pdf-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and Dispose Resources
fill-pdf-with-autofiller.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF form from a DataTable using AutoFiller and properly disposing the AutoFiller object.

batch-fill-pdf-template.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller to fill a PDF template repeatedly with a list of DataTables, creating separate output files for each data set.

fill-pdf-from-memory-stream.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-from-memory-stream.description: Loads a PDF template from a memory stream, fills its form fields from a DataTable using AutoFiller, and writes the filled PDF to a file without creating intermediate files.

export-xlsx-filter-pdf.title: Export XLSX to DataTable, Filter and Fill PDF
export-xlsx-filter-pdf.description: Demonstrates exporting data from an XLSX worksheet to a DataTable, filtering rows, and importing the subset into a PDF form.

auto-filler-custom-filename.title: Generate PDFs with Custom File Names Using AutoFiller
auto-filler-custom-filename.description: Demonstrates how to create separate PDF files from a template, naming each file based on a DataTable column value using Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller.

validate-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before DataTable Import
validate-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to verify that all required form fields in a PDF have matching DataTable columns before importing the data.

log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.title: Log DataTable Row Processing and Page Creation in PDF
log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate a DataTable, add each row to a PDF table, and log the processed row together with the current page count.

apply-pdf-password.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF Using PdfFileSecurity
apply-pdf-password.description: Demonstrates how to protect an existing PDF with a user and owner password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

merge-filled-pdfs.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs into a Single Document
merge-filled-pdfs.description: Fills a PDF template with several DataTables using AutoFiller, saves each filled PDF, and merges them into one consolidated PDF file.

pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert PDF to Byte Array for API Transmission
pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a filled PDF file and converts it to a byte array in memory without writing to disk, suitable for sending over a web API.

attach-xlsx-to-pdf.title: Attach XLSX File to PDF Using Asynchronous I/O
attach-xlsx-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading an XLSX file asynchronously, embedding it as an attachment in a PDF, and writing the PDF asynchronously.

autofiller-import-retry.title: AutoFiller Import with Retry Mechanism
autofiller-import-retry.description: Demonstrates how to import a DataTable into a PDF form using AutoFiller with a retry mechanism for transient file access errors.

pdf-page-identifier-report.title: Generate Summary Report of PDF Pages and DataTable Row Identifiers
pdf-page-identifier-report.description: Extracts tables from each PDF page, reads the identifier from the first cell, matches it to a DataTable row, and prints a summary of page numbers with the corresponding identifiers.

add-date-header-auto-filler.title: Add Date Header to AutoFiller Generated PDF
add-date-header-auto-filler.description: Demonstrates how to use AutoFiller to generate a PDF from a template and then add a header with the current date on each page.

fill-pdf-form-with-mapping.title: Fill PDF Form Using Excel-to-PDF Field Mapping from Config
fill-pdf-form-with-mapping.description: Demonstrates reading a CSV (as Excel data), applying a mapping file to translate column names to PDF form field names, and filling the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

stream-xlsx-to-autofiller.title: Stream Large XLSX Data into AutoFiller for PDF Generation
stream-xlsx-to-autofiller.description: Demonstrates reading a large XLSX file row by row and feeding batches into AutoFiller to generate PDFs without loading the entire dataset into memory.

validate-pdf-size-after-autofill.title: Validate PDF Size After Filling DataTable with AutoFiller
validate-pdf-size-after-autofill.description: Fills a PDF form using AutoFiller and checks that the resulting file does not exceed a predefined size limit.

autofiller-console-demo.title: Fill PDF Template with DataTable using AutoFiller (Console Demo)
autofiller-console-demo.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller to import a DataTable and generate a filled PDF in a console application.

fill-pdf-with-timeout.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-with-timeout.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF form using AutoFiller and aborting the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout via a cancellation token.

pdf-to-excel-temp-folder.title: Convert PDF to Excel Using a Temporary Folder for Intermediate Files
pdf-to-excel-temp-folder.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to an Excel workbook while configuring Aspose.Pdf to store intermediate data in a temporary directory, useful for large datasets.

split-filled-pdf.title: Split Filled PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-filled-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to split a filled PDF into separate one-page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

fill-pdf-form-from-excel.title: Fill PDF Form from Excel Data
fill-pdf-form-from-excel.description: Loads a PDF form and an Excel file, fills the form fields with the first row of data, and saves the result as a new PDF.
